steps.title: Identify the criterion
steps.content: The question requires dwarf planets with exactly one moon, matching Earth's situation. The “Number of moons” column directly provides this data.

steps.title: Find which pair both have 1 moon
steps.content: Makemake and Eris both have 1 moon in the “Number of moons” column. All other choices include at least one planet that doesn't have 1 moon. That is the correct answer.
